text: Considering the contradictory role of Prdx1, the key question is how to simultaneously supplement and enhance intracellular PRDX 1 while precisely neutralizing extracellular Prdx1 to exert anti-inflammatory effects. Addressing this paradoxical phenomenon of Prdx1, there is an urgent need to develop a dual intracellular and extracellular intervention strategy.
heading_context: 3.2 Extracellular Prdx1 significantly promoted macrophage-mediated inflammation in SAP through a TLR3-dependent pathways
